title: PermissionHolder
description: Details of a user, group, field, or project role that holds a permission. See [Holder object](../api-group-permission-schemes/#holder-object) in *Get all permission schemes* for more information.

expand.description: Expand options that include additional permission holder details in the response.

parameter.description: As a group's name can change, use of `value` is recommended. The identifier associated withthe `type` value that defines the holder of the permission.

value.description: The identifier associated with the `type` value that defines the holder of the permission.
